lineage: Public task plus three public source files only; guide and shared rubric are prohibited construction inputs.
aggregation: Twelve one-point criteria; score/12. No threshold licenses capability or validity claims.

criteria.public_basis: public-task.md experiment, stop, and change-evidence requirements

alternative_paths: Any allowed recommendation and any evidence organization pass when all public consequences are met.
claim_ceiling: Internal synthetic exact-version artifact discrimination only; no Skill effect, capability, expert/professional validity, safety, production fitness, cross-domain generality, or readiness.
